sentence: 这台超级计算机每秒能完成亿次运算。
pinyin: Zhè tái chāojí jìsuànjī měi miǎo néng wánchéng yì cì yùnsuàn.
english: This supercomputer can perform hundreds of millions of calculations per second.

meaning: (of an object or device) designed to stand vertically; upright; (of an
sentence: 厨房里放了一台立式冰箱。
pinyin: Chúfáng lǐ fàngle yī tái lìshì bīngxiāng.
english: An upright refrigerator was placed in the kitchen.

sentence: 这种中药有活血化瘀的作用。
pinyin: Zhè zhǒng zhōngyào yǒu huóxuè huàyū de zuòyòng.
english: This Chinese herbal medicine helps improve blood circulation and remove blood stasis.

meaning: to accomplish much; to have good prospects; to have a promising future
sentence: 年轻人在这个行业里大有作为。
pinyin: Niánqīng rén zài zhège hángyè lǐ dàyǒuzuòwéi.
english: Young people can accomplish a great deal in this industry.

meaning: see 開房間|开房间[kai1 fang2 jian1]
sentence: 他们到前台开房，登记了身份证。
pinyin: Tāmen dào qiántái kāi fáng, dēngjìle shēnfènzhèng.
english: They went to the front desk to check into a room and showed their ID.
